response.justification: Strong senior IC with 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience, deep testing/TDD background, and notable developer-tooling work (test runners, assertion libraries, CI setup, MCP code generators). However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no demonstrated org-leadership track record, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale — all of which are core requirements for this Engineering Manager role focused on mobile developer productivity.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runners, assertion libraries, CI/dev-ops infra, and AI-agent codegen frameworks
15+ years across web/mobile/embedded with strong TDD, pairing, trunk-based development practice
Active community/teaching profile — workshops, courses, talks — signals mentoring and knowledge-sharing aptitude
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed (JD requires 2+ years)
No mobile-platform ecosystem or large-scale build-system experience at the scale implied by the role
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a team roadmap at the manager level
